name: pi-uva-hva
description: Pi coding-agent provider extension for the UvA/HvA LiteLLM proxy. Adds a /login connect flow (pick base URL, paste API key), discovers every model with real capabilities from /model_group/info, routes each to the right endpoint (Responses vs chat-completions) with runtime self-heal, fixes empty output on tool turns, and defeats the gateway 504 on long reasoning turns via a background+poll path.
